data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding multiple documents per credential.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having multiple documents per credential, but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement. The prior step evidence does not address the existence or handling of multiple documents associated with a single credential, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed as there is no direct evidence to support or refute the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of multiple documents per credential.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the handling of multiple documents per credential.
